data.description: According to the source, the EU probe into Meta may take place Thursday.

data.title: DOGP to increase DOG token holdings to 8B through MEMECOINS subsidiary's deal for 4B tokens, doubling its exposure.
data.description: DOGP's subsidiary, MEMECOINS, has recently announced an agreement to purchase 4 billion DOG tokens. This acquisition will significantly increase DOGP's overall exposure to the DOG currency, with the total amount held across its digital-asset entities now exceeding 8 billion DOG.

data.title: Formycon & MS Pharma form partnership to commercialize FYB206 Keytruda® biosimilar in MENA region.
data.description: In a joint statement on December 4, 2025, Formycon AG and MS Pharma disclosed their exclusive licensing and supply deal for the distribution of FYB206, Formycon's biosimilar drug. The agreement pertains to the commercialization of FYB206, with Formycon holding the FSE: FYB, Prime Standard designation. This collaboration marks a significant milestone for both companies in the pharmaceutical sector.

data.title: Kahoot! report on UK Gen Z workers after 1 year: reveals generational tensions, search for belonging, recognition, purpose.
data.description: A recent survey conducted in the UK sheds light on the work experiences of Generation Z after completing one year in their jobs. The study reveals that this period has been influenced by generational conflicts and the quest for a sense of belonging, acknowledgment, and significance. The findings, released in London on December 4, 2025, indicate that the youngest workers in Britain are introducing new viewpoints to the workforce...

data.title: XFun dating app reports 35% year-over-year growth in user base as demand increases for clear, commitment-free connections.
data.description: Today, XFun, a platform known for facilitating commitment-free connections since 2019, revealed a considerable increase in its user base. The platform has prioritized transparent casual dating as part of its growth strategy. The surge in users showcases the demand for clear-intent relationships in the community.

data.title: Predicted ARB price to reach $0.25-$0.27 in Jan 2026, with 13-22% upside despite temporary bearish trend. Support at $0.19.
data.description: Predictions for the price of ARB indicate a possible 13-22% increase to a range between $0.25 and $0.27 by January 2026. However, in the short term, there could be a dip testing the $0.19 support level.

data.title: Scott Bessent believes Trump's tariff policies will continue permanently, regardless of Supreme Court decision. Tariff structures can be recreated with sections 301, 232, and 122 of the 1962 Trade Act.
data.description: U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent expressed his confidence in the administration's ability to uphold its tariff policies regardless of the ongoing Supreme Court case. Speaking at The New York Times DealBook Summit, he reiterated his belief in the administration's capacity to maintain its tariff agenda even in the event of a loss in the Supreme Court case. Bessent highlighted sections of the 1962 Trade Act that provide the president with significant authority over import duties. He mentioned the possibility of recreating the existing tariff structure using sections 301, 232, and 122. Bessent noted that section 122s are considered permanent, while the other sections could also be made permanent. He emphasized that any potential loss in the case would not negatively impact the administration's stance.

data.title: NEAR Protocol predicts $2.35-$2.82 by Dec 2025, 24-47% gain from current $2.00 resistance with neutral RSI at 44.26.
data.description: According to a forecast for NEAR Protocol, there is a possibility of a 24-47% increase, leading to a price range of $2.35-$2.82 by December 2025. This increase is dependent on surpassing the resistance level of $2.00. Currently, the Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at a neutral level of 44.26.

data.title: Third World Living Soils Forum in Arles on June 3-4, 2026, announced by Moët Hennessy. Co-organized with ChangeNOW. Paris, Dec. 4, 2025.
data.description: Moët Hennessy, the Wines & Spirits branch of LVMH, has revealed plans for the third edition of the World Living Soils Forum (WLSF), in partnership with ChangeNOW. The event is scheduled for June 3-4, 2026, at LUMA Arles.

data.title: Economist Mohamed El-Erian criticizes Federal Reserve for policy missteps and internal dysfunction, calls for sweeping reforms. Fed's credibility at risk.
data.description: Leading economist Mohamed El-Erian is criticizing the Federal Reserve for a lack of credibility due to policy missteps and internal dysfunction. He called for sweeping reforms to address these issues. El-Erian emphasized the importance of looking beyond short-term decisions, like rate cuts, to focus on broader reforms. He highlighted Cleveland Fed President Loretta Mester's admission of mistakes within the central bank. El-Erian's comments were made on CNBC's "Squawk Box." The article points to internal acknowledgment within the Fed that changes are necessary to improve its forecasting and operations, as noted by El-Erian and Mester.

data.title: APT price projected to rebound to $2.92 in 2-3 weeks after hitting oversold RSI of 29.88. Critical support at $1.81.
data.description: There are predictions for a potential rebound in the APT price, which has an oversold Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 29.88. The forecast suggests a test of the $2.92 resistance level, with a critical support level at $1.81 that will influence the direction of the price movement.

data.title: XLM may hit $0.27 in 2 weeks, facing resistance at $0.25 - risk to $0.22 support zone. Bullish trend predicted.
data.description: Predictions suggest that the price of XLM could potentially rise to a resistance level of $0.27 in the next 14 days. However, there is a significant barrier at the $0.25 pivot point, with bearish pressure posing a threat to push the price down to the support zone at $0.22.

data.title: Tracebit launches community edition for security canary detection, making it easier to deploy canaries at scale.
data.description: In London, the cloud-native deception platform Tracebit has introduced its 'community edition' to promote the idea that security canaries should be a foundational element in security strategies. Canaries, which are decoy resources, serve as early indicators of cyber threats, alerting organizations when malicious actors breach systems and facilitating quick responses. Tracebit, established in 2023, aims to address the challenges associated with implementing and managing canaries on a large scale. The platform's community edition launch emphasizes the importance of integrating canaries into security programs to enhance protection against cyber threats.

data.title: UMC and Polar partner for U.S. onshore semiconductor manufacturing. Expanding with scalable 8-inch high-quality wafer production.
data.description: Hsinchu, Taiwan and Bloomington, Minnesota - United Microelectronics Corporation (UMC), a prominent global semiconductor foundry, and Polar Semiconductor, LLC, a U.S.-based foundry focusing on high-voltage, power, and sensor technologies, have revealed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) for potential collaboration. The agreement aims to investigate working together to establish scalable 8-inch wafer production in the U.S., catering to vital requirements for various applications. UMC is listed on NYSE: UMC and TWSE: 2303, while Polar Semiconductor, LLC operates in Bloomington, Minnesota.

data.title: FICO report shows UK credit card delinquency rising in Sept 2025, especially among long-term cardholders.
data.description: Recent credit card data analysis released by FICO for September 2025 highlights the financial challenges households are grappling with. Following the Autumn Budget, there is a noticeable trend of cardholders with significant debt (three missed payments) slipping into further delinquency. This phenomenon is particularly prevalent among customers who have held their credit card for over five years. The analysis showcases a substantial year-on-year decrease in...

data.title: Al-Futtaim and SNP convert 16 TB ECC to S/4HANA in record time in August 2025 as part of RISE with SAP program.
data.description: In August 2025, Al-Futtaim (AFG) Automotive achieved a successful go-live for their intricate 16 terabyte ECC to S/4HANA transformation project. This initiative was conducted under the RISE with SAP program, with SNP's Kyano CrystalBridge Transformation DTS technology facilitating the conversion of various clients and business modules.

data.title: TRON aims for $0.33 breakout by January 2025 with 17% potential upside and key support at $0.27 amid bullish momentum shift.
data.description: Analysis of TRON's technical indicators indicates a bullish MACD divergence, suggesting a potential upward movement towards a resistance level of $0.33. Price forecasts for TRX anticipate a 17% increase, with significant support identified at $0.27.
